WEBPAGE_TITLE: Portfolio, Ivan Manrique | Frontend Dev & Data Analyst
HERO_H1: Code, data and miles: I build solutions that perform.
HERO_H2: Frontend Developer & Data Analyst. I turn data into decisions and ideas into high-impact interfaces, with the same discipline as someone who runs long distances across the desert.
ABOUT_P1: I'm Ivan Daniel Manrique Roa, Frontend Developer and Data Analyst. I build bridges between the data world and user experience, turning complex requirements into digital products that deliver measurable results.
ABOUT_P2: I'm currently pursuing a Software Engineering degree at UTP, where I was selected for the executive talent program Impulsa UTP and rank in the top third of my class. My journey blends two worlds: the analytical precision of data and the art of crafting interfaces that delight.
ABOUT_P3: Away from the screen, I'm a disciplined runner. I'm training for a 35km desert race in Marcona, starting at 3AM, and am on track to earn the "Medal of Inspiration". Every kilometer reinforces the same skills I apply in code: resilience, focus under pressure, time management, and continuous improvement. One sprint at a time, one commit at a time.
EXPERIENCE_SUBTITLE: Proven results with the STAR method
EXP_RIPNEL_1: Built a full corporate ERP from scratch using React, Next.js, and Supabase, delivering a functional platform that centralizes the company's internal operations.
EXP_RIPNEL_2: Implemented automation pipelines with Generative AI for data validation and processing, reducing registration time by 30% and eliminating recurring manual errors.
EXP_RIPNEL_3: Designed and integrated an intelligent multilingual chatbot, decreasing customer response time by 45% and improving internal support satisfaction scores.
EXP_RIPNEL_4: Collaborated directly with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical features, applying agile methodologies with iterative deliveries.
EXP_TP_1: Promoted to Trilingual Tier 4 (Spanish, English, Portuguese), leading support teams and serving as the escalation point for high-complexity cases.
EXP_TP_2: Deployed interactive dashboards with Tableau for operational metric analysis, optimizing KPI visualization and reducing weekly reporting time by 40%.
EXP_TP_3: Led training and mentoring sessions for over 20 agents, increasing First Contact Resolution (FCR) rates by 25% through documentation and process standardization.
EXP_TP_4: Managed customer data with a focus on quality and integrity, applying Data Cleaning techniques and exploratory analysis to identify recurrence patterns and propose preventive solutions.
PROJ_RIPNEL_DESC: A textile and retail company relied entirely on manual, paper-based processes for their inventory, transfers, and daily sales, leading to inefficiencies and data discrepancies. I co-developed Ripnel, a comprehensive, custom web-based ERP and POS (Point of Sale) system designed to fully digitize their operations across multiple store locations. Built highly responsive and optimized user interfaces using modern frontend frameworks, coupled with a robust backend architecture to handle complex business logic (sales, multi-location inventory, cash registers). Integrated an Agentic AI assistant (Google Gemini) directly into the database to automate analytics, provide real-time reporting, and answer natural language queries. Authored comprehensive system documentation to ensure long-term maintainability.
PROJ_RIPNEL_RESULT: 30% reduction in operational time and 45% reduction in customer response time.
PROJ_RIPNEL_TECHS: React | Next.js | Supabase | TypeScript | Tailwind CSS | Google Gemini AI | PostgreSQL
PROJ_COMMERCIAL_BI_DESC: Developed a comprehensive commercial tracking dashboard using Power BI for a simulated business case. The project focused on transforming raw data into an interactive and visually engaging dashboard to track key company metrics. I implemented advanced DAX formulas, created calculated tables, and designed memory-optimized measures to ensure high performance and fast load times. The final product successfully provided clear, actionable insights for commercial decision-making.
PROJ_COMMERCIAL_BI_RESULT: Interactive dashboard with advanced DAX and memory-optimized measures for commercial decisions.
PROJ_COMMERCIAL_BI_TECHS: Power BI | DAX | SQL | Data Modeling | ETL | Data Visualization
PROJ_CX_METRICS_DESC: Managed and analyzed data using an interactive dashboard system in Tableau and SQL Server for a global BPO company. My role focused on operating these tools to track, interpret, and report critical Customer Experience metrics, including First Contact Resolution, CSAT, and Average Resolution Time. By efficiently navigating the existing data pipelines and streamlining the daily reporting workflow, I successfully reduced report generation time by 40% and provided clear, actionable insights that increased decision-making efficiency across the management team by 18%.
PROJ_CX_METRICS_RESULT: 40% reduction in report generation time and 18% increase in decision-making efficiency.
PROJ_CX_METRICS_TECHS: Tableau | SQL Server | Excel | ETL | CX Metrics | Data Pipelines
PROJ_SOCIAL_EDA_DESC: Conducted an Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on a social media dataset using Python. I successfully cleaned and processed the data to track customer engagement trends, identified the root causes for historical drops in user interaction, and proposed data-driven resolutions to improve future performance. The analysis revealed behavioral patterns and inflection points that enabled actionable strategic recommendations.
PROJ_SOCIAL_EDA_RESULT: Identified root causes of engagement drops and delivered data-driven recommendations.
PROJ_SOCIAL_EDA_TECHS: Python | Pandas | NumPy | Matplotlib | Seaborn | Jupyter | EDA
PROJ_LAW_FIRM_DESC: The law firm needed to modernize their case and client management, transitioning from manual processes to a fast and secure digital environment. I created an intuitive web application where lawyers could access information instantly, with a clear routing system for seamless navigation. The result aligned with the expectations: a professional UI/UX design that conveyed trust and a robust technical architecture capable of handling databases efficiently. Includes user authentication, protected routes, service listings from database, and contact email sending.
PROJ_LAW_FIRM_RESULT: Functional system with authentication, protected routing, and database integration.
PROJ_LAW_FIRM_TECHS: React | MySQL | Node.js | HTML5 | CSS3 | JavaScript
PROJ_RIPNEL_PROBLEM: Textile company relied on manual, paper-based processes for inventory, transfers, and sales, leading to inefficiencies and data discrepancies.
PROJ_COMMERCIAL_BI_PROBLEM: Need to transform raw commercial data into an interactive dashboard for agile decision-making.
PROJ_CX_METRICS_PROBLEM: Slow manual CX report generation, making it difficult to track FCR, CSAT, and resolution times.
PROJ_SOCIAL_EDA_PROBLEM: Historical drops in social media engagement with no identified root cause.
PROJ_LAW_FIRM_PROBLEM: Law firm with manual case and client management, slow and insecure processes.

SKILL_1_SCENARIO: Promotion to Tier 4 at Teleperformance and Group Case at Impulsa UTP
SKILL_1_DESC: I rose to become the first Trilingual Tier 3 Agent in Lima by leading metrics, taking on strategic Tier 4 responsibilities. At the Impulsa Program Assessment Center, I proposed critical solutions earning the technical respect of my team.
SKILL_2_DESC: I was the first to deliver a presentation video respecting the strict 7-minute limit. I learned to prioritize objective fulfillment and operational efficiency over unnecessary perfectionism.
SKILL_3_DESC: I'm actively working on breaking the ice and overcoming shyness. Through vulnerability dynamics in my Clown classes and mental 'Set-Shifting' at networking events, I'm learning to let go of control and be more natural and communicative.
SKILL_4_DESC: After a severe meniscus injury, I replaced frustration with discipline, doing the 'boring work' of therapy to recover and set a new epic goal: running 35km in Marcona. This resilience allows me to face bugs and challenges with patience.
SKILL_5_DESC: I cultivated an entrepreneurial mindset by taking on the development of Ripnel from scratch. I learned to research new technologies autonomously, optimize my code, and manage a complete project without direct supervision.
SKILL_6_DESC: Through self-awareness, therapy, and deep psychology readings, I'm learning to manage cognitive dissonance and regulate my emotions. I use frameworks like the SPEA canvas to understand my reactions to stress.
SKILL_7_DESC: I resolved over 1,900 cases reducing resolution times by 25% and maintaining 80% customer satisfaction. This organizational capacity under stress also helped me stand out at the Impulsa Assessment Center.
SKILL_8_DESC: My time at Chinawok was my first great school on real-world team dynamics. In a fast-paced, high-demand environment, I developed my ability to resolve conflicts, communicate effectively, and maintain pace during peak hours.
